content:
saulecabrera opened PR #13846 from saulecabrera:winch-tests-aarch64 to bytecodealliance:main:

The wasmtime_test macro already takes care of handling non-supported architectures per backend.

  • Explain why this change is needed. If the details are in an issue already,
    this can be brief.

Please ensure all communication follows the code of conduct:

saulecabrera requested dicej for a review on PR #13846.
